name: N2Tech Co., Ltd
summary: Microtech Co., Ltd. provides hardware semiconductor equipment and general machine processing solutions for CVD equipment manufactures. Its semiconductor products include dispersion head assays, dispersion head assays, semiconductor SUS chambers, powder trap assays, gate valves, shield screen assays, shield screen assays, semiconductor chamber parts, and semiconductor parts. The company also provides LCD vacuum chambers, LCD chamber, LCD-aging ovens, and slit doors. Microtech Co. Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is based in Anseong-Si, South Korea.
